en-US.title: Mojave Run: Wasteland Drive
en-US.shortDescription: Survive the wasteland. Arcade driving with ghost co-op, bosses, upgrades & zombies.
en-US.fullDescription:
MOJAVE RUN is a fast-paced wasteland arcade driving game. Race through the scorched Mojave desert, dodge obstacles, blast enemies, and survive as long as you can.

🏎️ GARAGE & UPGRADES
Unlock 18 vehicles — from rusty pickups to armored war rigs. Upgrade speed, armor, and firepower in the garage. Each vehicle handles differently, with unique abilities, cosmetics, crafting mods, and weapon specializations.

💀 ZOMBIE HORDE MODE
The dead have risen in the wasteland. Fight through waves of zombies in a dedicated survival mode with special infected, survivor rescues, boss zombies, and exclusive tools.

🏆 GAUNTLET & CAMPAIGN
Conquer 18 tiered gauntlet sectors with escalating difficulty. Travel across 36 campaign locations spanning the post-apocalyptic United States — from the Mojave to the frozen north.

👑 IRON THRONE
Master every sector and campaign location to unlock the ultimate boss-only challenge: 8 legendary stages, each with a named weapon and unique boss pattern.

🔄 PRESTIGE & SEASONS
Reset for powerful prestige bonuses. Compete in rotating seasonal events and weekly challenges for bonus scrap and exclusive rewards.

🤝 MULTIPLAYER & VERSUS
Join room-code ghost co-op sessions so friends appear on your road, or enter server-authoritative 1v1 Versus matches through the relay.

🛠️ CRAFTING & WORKSHOP
Craft new components from salvaged scrap and boss parts. Specialize weapons for your playstyle.

📸 PHOTO MODE & REPLAYS
Capture epic moments with the built-in photo mode. Record and share your best runs.

🏴 CLAN TAGS & RIVALS
Set a clan tag for scoreboards. Import rival ghost data and race against their best runs.

Features:
• 18 unlockable vehicles with unique abilities
• 18 gauntlet sectors + 36 campaign locations
• Zombie Horde survival mode
• Ghost co-op rooms and server-authoritative Versus
• Prestige system with New Game+
• Seasonal events & weekly challenges
• Crafting workshop & weapon specializations
• Cloud save & cross-device sync
• Gamepad support
• Offline play

The wasteland awaits. How far can you drive?

icon.note: Export as 512x512 PNG (32-bit, no transparency) for Play Store upload

featureGraphic.note: Create cinematic wasteland scene with car + logo. Required for Play Store.

recommended: Gameplay: driving through desert with enemies
Zombie Horde: action shot with zombie waves

securityPractices.deletionPolicy: Users can request data deletion; uninstall removes local data

releaseStrategy.note: Start at 10% staged rollout; monitor 24h for crashes/ANRs, then ramp to 50% then 100%
